title: Battle Uniforms
description: Step into the world of tactical gear with the Battle Uniforms Mod.
body:
Description
Step into the world of tactical gear with the Battle Uniforms Mod. This mod adds a collection of battle-ready uniforms, designed to give your Minecraft character a more realistic and stylish look. From rugged outfits for exploration to sleek designs for combat, each uniform is carefully crafted to fit the needs of any player looking to elevate their in-game appearance. Whether you're preparing for battle or embarking on an adventure, these uniforms are perfect for any occasion.

Built to work seamlessly with the Improved Military Uniforms Mod, this mod offers even more variety in your character’s wardrobe. If you’re already rocking military-inspired gear, you can now add even more options to match your playstyle. With these two mods together, you can create a fully outfitted character with a wide range of military and battle uniforms, making sure you’re always ready for whatever comes your way in the Minecraft world!

List of Uniforms:

Army

Navy

Marines

Police

 

List of Beret (Units)

Army:

Recon, Old Guard, Defender, Ranger & Scout

Navy:

Navy Seal

Marines

Police:

Special Action Force
